summary: The room is a modern, open-plan reception and kitchen area. The visible portion of the space shows clean, well-maintained structural elements including white walls and ceilings, and light wood-effect flooring. Furniture includes a large grey velvet-style sofa with some visible surface wear/marks on the cushions and armrests, and a piece of contemporary wall art. A window provides a view of an urban landscape.
